name: chr19p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 19 p-arm pericentric flank (19p11-19p12), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr19 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D19Z1/D19Z2/D19Z3), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. The 19p12 region carries extensive ZNF KRAB-zinc-finger paralog clusters. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Three coexisting alpha-sat HORs (D19Z1/D19Z2/D19Z3) on the p-side; pericentromeric SD shoreline + ZNF KRAB-zinc-finger paralog clusters.
